subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to God! Numerous letters from thee were received, and the contents of all were truly pleasing [3.5s]... ...Concerning the question of marriage and the stipulated period between the time of the engagement and the marriage
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبه الی الله مکاتیب متعدده شما رسید مضامین جمیع دلنشین بود فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @laws of marriage and dowry, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @obedience to and respect for government authority
